title: Senior Plant Manager at Prince Pipes

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Prince Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes:
Prince Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes!
